title: generate for Can't find definition  in dotted task/function

features.name: interface instantiation inside generate for loop
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiation inside a generate for loop with genvar
features.snippet:
generate for(genvar i = 0; i < 4; i++)
begin
    InterfaceName #(.PARAM(i)) inst();
end
endgenerate

features.name: dotted method call on generate-scoped interface instance
features.description: Code should include a dotted method call on an interface instance that is instantiated inside a generate block, called from a procedural block outside the generate scope
features.snippet:
generate for(genvar i = 0; i < 4; i++)
begin
    MyIf #(.STAGE(i)) p1();
end
endgenerate

always_ff @(posedge clk)
    data_out <= p1.doShift(stall, shift);

features.name: interface with struct packed member and methods
features.description: Code should include an interface definition containing a struct packed member and function methods
